title: A high coverage Mesolithic aurochs genome and ancient cattle genome imputation
author: Erven, J.A.M.
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0

steps.instruction: This is the open-access VCF file that was created in the article: " A high coverage Mesolithic aurochs genome and effective leveraging of ancient cattle genomes using whole genome imputation." Information about the filtering steps can be found in the method section. Extra information on the sample IDs can be found in the Supplementary tables.
